text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey has been a little off her game
recently. She says she wants to visit a shrine, so I
go along with her.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll offer up a prayer today and turn my
luck Copa-tastic! ☆
choice_data_list: Is praying to the gods a part of feng shui?
Is praying to the gods a part of feng shui?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... praying... Naturally, I came here hoping
to receive a blessing, but my main reason for
coming was to thank the gods!
choice_data_list: Are you thankful for being in a slump?
Are you thankful for being in a slump?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Well, no... But also, not no.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm obviously grateful when things are going well,
but that gratitude is even more important when
things are rough!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Saying thank you is the first step. The power of
your gratitude improves your positive qi flow,
making it easier to receive divine blessings. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Besides, showing gratitude makes both you and
the other person happy, right? Having gratitude
for other people and your surroundings is one of
the main tenets of feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It improves your qi circulation and enriches your
heart at the same time. In doing so, the
synergistic effect will boost your luck! Rickey! ☆
Lucky! ☆ Super happy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Right, then, let's go and show our gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've paid our respects, I kind of want
to take a stroll around the shrine grounds. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Each shrine has its own affinity with one of the
five elements. Think of them as power spots rife
with qi. ☆ Just walking through them can fill you
with positive energy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... Doesn't it feel nice?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The gentle breeze, the smell of plants... I can feel
my inner qi being harmonized.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, my body feels somehow lighter! ♪ I'm so
grateful!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You must have shown a lot of gratitude to the
gods on my behalf, yeah, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, I have to thank you too! Thank you for always
being there for me! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Showing gratitude to each other is the
greatest blessing! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following that, we happily make our way back
while expressing our gratitude for everything we
see on the way.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, it's starting to rain! Let's hurry back!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Phew, it's really pouring. It took ages for my
uniform to dry too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But, it's precisely at times like these we should be
thankful, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I have to trust that my inner feng shui will
harmonize my soul and boost my luck, even if it's
just a little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey keeps trying to encourage herself
with positive words, but she can't seem to break
out of her slump.
